dishes.name: Margherita Pizza
dishes.violationReason: Italian pizza base sauces typically contain garlic. Cannot confirm without asking kitchen.
dishes.hiddenRisk: Garlic powder is common in Italian herb seasoning blends used on the crust.
alternatives: Ask for plain tomato with just basil

dishes.name: Mushroom Risotto
dishes.violationReason: Contains mushrooms which violate satvik and Jain practice. Risotto stock almost always contains white wine.
dishes.hiddenRisk: White wine is a standard ingredient in risotto preparation even when not stated on the menu.
alternatives: Grilled vegetable plate — confirm no garlic

dishes.name: Penne Pomodoro
dishes.hiddenRisk: Confirm with kitchen that tomato sauce does not contain garlic. Some Italian restaurants add garlic as standard.
dishes.observanceNote: Safe today. On Ekadashi in 2 days, pasta will be restricted as it contains wheat.

dishes.name: Caesar Salad
dishes.violationReason: Classic Caesar dressing contains Worcestershire sauce made with anchovies, and egg yolk in the dressing base.
dishes.hiddenRisk: Even vegetarian Caesar versions often retain the Worcestershire flavor base. Always confirm.
alternatives: Garden salad with olive oil and lemon
Ask for plain greens with no dressing

dishes.name: Garlic Bread
dishes.violationReason: Garlic is the primary ingredient. Garlic powder also present in the butter mix.
dishes.hiddenRisk: Some focaccia-style garlic breads use egg wash on the crust.
alternatives: Plain bread or grissini — confirm no garlic butter

dishes.name: Tiramisu
dishes.violationReason: Traditional tiramisu contains Kahlua or Marsala wine (alcohol) and egg yolks in the mascarpone mix.
dishes.hiddenRisk: Some restaurant versions use gelatin as a stabilizer.
alternatives: Ask for a non-alcoholic dessert option

dishes.name: Panna Cotta
dishes.hiddenRisk: Panna cotta is set with gelatin. Cannot determine if vegetarian or agar-based without asking kitchen.
alternatives: Ask kitchen: is the panna cotta set with gelatin or agar-agar?

observanceAlert: Ekadashi is in 2 days. On that day, Penne Pomodoro and all pasta will be restricted as they contain wheat.
